product_overview: QSM is a Quran school management platform that supports Arabic-first workflows for managing users, classes, students, and school operations. It provides a Laravel Sanctum-based backend API for authentication and academic administration.
core_goals: Provide secure token-based authentication for school users
Allow authorized users to list and manage students and classes
Support role-based access control across school operations
Deliver an API foundation for a Quran school management frontend

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Allows users to log in securely and obtain a Sanctum token for accessing protected endpoints.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with JWT/Sanctum token -> Use token to call protected endpoints such as GET /api/students -> Receive authorized data
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> Retry login with corrected credentials -> Receive 200 with token

features.name: Students Management API
features.description: Provides authenticated access to the student directory for school staff and other permitted roles.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> GET /api/students with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with Student[] list
GET /api/students without auth token -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> Authenticate with POST /api/auth/login -> Retry GET /api/students with token -> Receive 200 with Student[] list

features.name: Classes Management API
features.description: Provides authenticated access to the class list for users who need to view academic classes.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> GET /api/classes with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with Class[] list
GET /api/classes without auth token -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Retry GET /api/classes with token -> Receive 200 with Class[] list
